```typescript xp-source
type Pathname = string

interface IgnoreRule {
  pattern: string
  mark?: string
  negative: boolean
}

interface TestResult {
  ignored: boolean
  unignored: boolean
  rule?: IgnoreRule
}

interface PatternParams {
  pattern: string
  mark?: string
}
```

Creates new ignore manager.

```typescript xp-source
declare function ignore(options?: ignore.Options): ignore.Ignore
declare namespace ignore {
  interface Ignore {
```

Adds one or several rules to the current manager.
@param  {string[]} patterns
@returns IgnoreBase

```typescript xp-source
add(
      patterns: string | Ignore | readonly (string | Ignore)[] | PatternParams
    ): this
```

Filters the given array of pathnames, and returns the filtered array.
NOTICE that each path here should be a relative path to the root of your repository.
@param paths the array of paths to be filtered.
@returns The filtered array of paths

```typescript xp-source
filter(pathnames: readonly Pathname[]): Pathname[]
```

Creates a filter function which could filter
an array of paths with Array.prototype.filter.

```typescript xp-source
createFilter(): (pathname: Pathname) => boolean
```

Returns Boolean whether pathname should be ignored.
@param  {string} pathname a path to check
@returns boolean

```typescript xp-source
ignores(pathname: Pathname): boolean
```

Returns whether pathname should be ignored or unignored
@param  {string} pathname a path to check
@returns TestResult

```typescript xp-source
test(pathname: Pathname): TestResult
```

Debugs ignore rules and returns the checking result, which is
  equivalent to `git check-ignore -v`.
@returns TestResult

```typescript xp-source
checkIgnore(pathname: Pathname): TestResult
  }

  interface Options {
    ignorecase?: boolean
    // For compatibility
    ignoreCase?: boolean
    allowRelativePaths?: boolean
  }

  function isPathValid(pathname: string): boolean
}

export = ignore
```
